zh.lifeSummary: 當Hamelin de Ballon於大約1060年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特巴隆時，他的父親Drogo de Baalon38歲，母親Eunice Mary22歲。他於1085年與Mrs. Agnès of London De Ballon結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1105年3月5日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hamelin de Ballon于大约1060年出生在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特巴隆时，他的父亲Drogo de Baalon38岁，母亲Eunice Mary22岁。他于1085年与Mrs. Agnès of London De Ballon结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1105年3月5日在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ballon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Sergio, Alfonso, Cesar, Conchita, Emigdio, Enrique, Felipe, Francisco, Jose Luis, Julio, Ruben.  Jewish Hyman, Isadore.

French and English (Middlesex): from the Old French personal name Ballon, Ballun, derived from the oblique stem of ancient Germanic Ballo, a short form of compound names based on the element bal, presumably meaning ‘torment, spitefulness’ (see Ballard ).

variants.name: Ballard
meanings: English: from Middle English ballard ‘bald-headed man’ (compare Bald 3).
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Balhard, composed of the elements bal, presumably meaning ‘torment, spitefulness’, and hard ‘hard, strong’. Compare Ballor .

variants.name: Ballam
meanings: English (Dorset): variant of Balaam (assimilated by folk etymology to the Biblical personal name Balaam, see Numbers 23–24), which is a habitational name from Baylham in Suffolk or a Norman surname derived from Ballon in Le Mans, Sarthe, France (compare Ballon ). The surname may also be a variant of English Balham, perhaps from Balham in Streatham, Surrey, named with Old English bealg ‘smooth’ or ‘round’ + hamm ‘water meadow, land hemmed in by water’.

nameMeanings.name: Hamelin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Cecile, Dominique, Etienne, Jacques, Jean-Paul, Lucien, Monique, Normand, Renald.

variants.name: Hamel
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting the tree (Old English hæsel), or its light reddish-brown nuts. This is one of the most successful of the names coined in the 19th century from words denoting plants.

en.lifeSummary: When Hamelin de Ballon was born about 1060, in Ballon, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France, his father, Drogo de Baalon, was 38 and his mother, Eunice Mary, was 22. He married Mrs. Agnès of London De Ballon in 1085. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 5 March 1105, in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hamelin de Ballon est né environ 1060, à Ballon, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Drogo de Baalon, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Eunice Mary, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Agnès of London De Ballon en 1085. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 5 mars 1105, à Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 46 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Hamelin de Ballonが約1060年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーサルスボーロンで生まれた時，父Drogo de Baalonは38歳，母Eunice Maryは22歳であった。1085年にMrs. Agnès of London De Ballonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1105年3月5日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアグロウセスターで46歳で死去した。

ko.Ballon, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 바런
ko.lifeSummary: Hamelin de Ballon(이)가 대략 1060년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 바런에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Drogo de Baalon(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Eunice Mary(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1085년 Mrs. Agnès of London De Ballon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1105년 3월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 그루스스터에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Ballon, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France: баллон, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hamelin de Ballon родился около 1060 г. в местности баллон, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Drogo de Baalon было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Eunice Mary, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Agnès of London De Ballon в 1085 г. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 5 марта 1105 г. в местности глоусестир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 46 лет.
